title: MuleSoft Connector Integration
excerpt: In my company we are MuleSoft partners. They provide an integration platform that has nearly 300 connectors available for integrating and interconnecting applications and more. These connectors are exposed through the ma…

posts.author: creinoza (Carlos Reinoza)
posts.cookedHtml: In my company we are MuleSoft partners. They provide an integration platform that has nearly 300 connectors available for integrating and interconnecting applications and more. These connectors are exposed through the marketplace that is Anypoint Exchange. At this time we want to create the Moday.com MuleSoft Connector to be available for free on Anypoint Exchange and offer this capability to the developer community and all MuleSoft customers globally. This development has no cost for you or economic benefit for us beyond the marketing that we can obtain. We will need to use their API and the monday.com logo. After finishing the development, the connector will be evaluated by MuleSoft, published in the marketplace and we will be doing some webinars to explain the advantages of using the connector and its ease. To advance to a second step we need to receive the go-ahead from you

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @creinoza!

Thanks for reaching out. I see that you were also able to get connected to our team via email.

As such, why don’t we continue the conversation there?

Thanks!

posts.author: creinoza (Carlos Reinoza)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Helen,

I am looking for the answer to my question.

Can you help me?

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @creinoza,

Not yet! Still waiting for a response.

Thanks for your patience,
Helen

posts.author: Helen (Helen)
posts.cookedHtml: Marking this as closed as our team member has reached out since.
